item.title: Returning stolen goods pt 114
item.description:
There's always time for a Minipoo
This is my hubby. He always makes time for a megapoo
Blueberries taste amazing sometimes. Another blueberry tastes like a diaper. You know what always tastes the same?? Doritos
Sorry for the uncropped screenshot. I bought this book for my American friend Liz and it arrived today so I'm gonna spend $40 in postage tomorrow and send it to her and I'm so excited!!
I have those boots in blue
My absolute favorite bird. Every May I make a huge deal out of their return to Norway :-)
OC. A roly poly painted a butt. I laughed.
item.dc:creator: MrsPrendsen

item.title: You should look up Marilee Jones the former dean of admissions at MIT. She spent like 30 years working her way to the top of the food chain on a fake MS degree and when it came to light they axed her immediately and publically.
item.dc:creator: SkyPigeon123

item.title: What the hell am I supposed to say to them?
item.description: I’m in an urban area in Canada. Almost none of the kids in my school were born here. Around 2/3 of them were born in Iran, Russia and Ukraine. They all have family and friends back home. One kid told me when the bombing of Tehran started, he was video chatting with his mum … then they started hearing explosions outside and the signal went dead. Then he heard about the attack and how the Internet was knocked out, and he panicked. Thankfully she’s okay, but Jesus, that generation has been through it. And what do I, a Canadian who’s never had to worry about bunker-busters or drone swarms, say to them? One positive, even beautiful thing: these kids have a ton of empathy and are supporting each other. For instance the Russian and Ukrainian kids are close friends. Now if we could make sure China doesn’t invade Taiwan, we can prevent the percentage of my students being from war zones from passing 90% …
item.dc:creator: Huor

item.title: Two ships collided in the middle of the ocean. One was carrying red paint and the other was carrying blue paint. The crews of both ships were marooned.

item.title: What Happened Today #138
item.description: ? Trump’s regime is now physically targeting Democratic officials. Newark Mayor Ras Baraka was arrested by ICE agents outside a detention facility in early May. Since then, Rep. LaMonica McIver has been indicted, Sen. Alex Padilla handcuffed and removed from a press event, and NYC Comptroller Brad Lander arrested in the hallway of a federal immigration court by masked and plainclothes ICE officers. After two Minnesota lawmakers were shot and killed, Trump refused to call the governor and called it a waste of time. A GOP senator mocked the dead. Another all but admitted U.S. troops are already fighting in the Israel-Iran war. This isn’t law enforcement. It’s a purge that's accelerating. Don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email at  https://govbrief.today or find us on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/brad-lander-arrested 2. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-wont-call-walz 3. https://go.govbrief.today/appeal-heaven-flag 4. https://go.govbrief.today/health-funds-four-cities 5. https://go.govbrief.today/fda-priority-reviews 6. https://go.govbrief.today/cdc-rehired-one-third 7. https://go.govbrief.today/vaccine-advisors-blast-rfk 8. https://go.govbrief.today/passport-sex-markers 9. https://go.govbrief.today/baby-brain-dead-woman 10. https://go.govbrief.today/unconditiona-surrender-iran 11. https://go.govbrief.today/us-embassy-israel-closed 12. https://go.govbrief.today/cbo-deficits-2-8trillion 13. https://go.govbrief.today/retail-sales-fall 14. https://go.govbrief.today/toy-companies-tariffs 15. https://go.govbrief.today/la-curfew-lifted 16. https://go.govbrief.today/third-nj-detainee-caught 17. https://go.govbrief.today/adams-bans-reporter 18. https://go.govbrief.today/opm-performance-ratings 19. https://go.govbrief.today/carlson-cruz-iran 20. https://go.govbrief.today/noem-hospital-allergic-reaction 21. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-phone-gulf 22. https://go.govbrief.today/tiktok-extended-third-time Yesterday's Top Story - https://go.govbrief.today/nrc-commissioner-fired Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/6-tools-track-civil-liberties Subscribe Free & Private - https://govbrief.today ** Imgur - Back tonight for comments - running super late this morning.

item.title: Happy Birthday, Matty! <3
item.description: A year ago, @Matty3D shared this: https://imgur.com/gallery/3rd-birthday-row-where-only-websites-ive-signed-up-remember-happy-birthday-to-me-N0dnkwT Today, this one is for him! Happy Birthday, Matty! If this made you smile, then it worked. <3 Go have a great day! :)

item.title: Welcoming A New Member To The Family
item.description: Griha Pravesh is post-wedding ceremony where the bride is welcomed into her new marital home in Indian culture. Vermillion Footprints...The bride or newborn may step into a plate filled with vermillion water before entering, leaving their footprints as a symbol of their blessed arrival.
item.dc:creator: UnattendedDeviant

item.title: Pixie & Brutus: Dress-Up

Rose, on the other hand, thinks she looks quite lovely.
